assassin's_creed_revelations.notes:
Performance Notes

- Average performance: 25–30 FPS.
- To reduce stuttering, move the game to the C: drive.
- If you get a Ubisoft Launcher error, install it from the Start Menu (it's included).
- If you experience physics bugs, switch the FEXCore Preset to Performance (x86...). I don't encounter this issue myself, but if you do, this usually fixes it.
